shadows.name: engraved
shadows.value: inset 3px 0 6px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.85), inset -3px 0 6px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.85), inset 0 3px 6px -3px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.85)
shadows.purpose: Recessed middle column — depth carved inward.

shadows.name: bar-drop
shadows.purpose: Tight fold-shadow below compact section bars.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: The only lifted tier: transient overlays.

motion.name: phase-crossfade
motion.purpose: Issue-color crossfade via registered --issue @property; gated on prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: spinner
motion.purpose: The only perpetual motion, only while an agent computes; stillness means needs-you.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Superade Yellow signal action; navy ink, presses down 1px.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f5c518; color: #0a0f1c; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; font: 500 14px/1 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: background 150ms, transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(245,197,24,0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #f5c518; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,197,24,0.5); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Neutral action chip on the navy chassis.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: rgba(54,74,120,0.3); color: #d7d7e0; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid #364a78; border-radius: 6px; font: 500 14px/1 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(54,74,120,0.5); color: #f3f3f8; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,197,24,0.35); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Chrome-level quiet action; gains only a muted wash.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #9a9aa8; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; font: 500 14px/1 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #16223c; color: #f3f3f8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,197,24,0.35); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Red tint, never a solid red slab.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: rgba(229,48,63,0.15); color: #e5303f; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 6px; font: 500 14px/1 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: rgba(229,48,63,0.28); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: rgba(229,48,63,0.4); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(229,48,63,0.25); }

components.name: Input
components.description: Compact field on the app background; ring focus, no glow.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #0a0f1c; color: #d7d7e0; padding: 8px 10px; border: 1px solid #364a78; border-radius: 4.8px; font: 400 14px/1.4 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; transition: box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6c7690; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(245,197,24,0.4); }

components.name: Mono Section Label
components.css: .ds-label-mono { font-family: 'Geist Mono Variable', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 8.5px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #7a84a0; }

components.name: Quota Chip
components.description: Header chip: dim mono-adjacent text plus a 34x3.5px meter.
components.css: .ds-quota-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; color: #6c7690; font: 400 10.5px/1 'Geist Variable', sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-meter { display: inline-block; width: 34px; height: 3.5px; border-radius: 2px; background: #223564; overflow: hidden; } .ds-meter-fill { display: block; width: 60%; height: 100%; background: #2f6bff; }

narrative.overview: A stage where the work performs and the operator conducts. Dozens of agents run at once; the interface is the podium the conductor stands on — everything visible at a glance, nothing shouting for attention it hasn't earned. Superade Yellow is the winner's color: it marks the primary action and the one thing that needs you now, against a deep race-navy chassis. Fast, calm, precise, technical — Linear-grade density and instant interactions, with terminal honesty at its core.
keyCharacteristics: Compact 12px-base type scale; density is a feature, not a compromise
One brand yellow used as signal, never as decoration
Surfaces carved into the chassis (inset shadows, hairline seams), not floated above it
Issue colors as translucent tints over surfaces, never flat fills
Stillness means 'needs you' — the only perpetual motion is an agent actually working

rules.name: The Signal Rule
rules.body: Yellow marks the primary action or the thing waiting on you — one voice per screen region. If yellow appears somewhere nothing is asked of the operator, it is wrong.

rules.name: The Tint, Never Fill Rule
rules.body: Issue colors color-mix into their base surface at prescribed percentages. A flat fill of an issue color is prohibited.

rules.name: The Reserved Hues Rule
rules.body: Terracotta (Claude), the motion colors, and the theme's signal hues are excluded from the issue palette so state and identity never collide.

rules.name: The Machine Voice Rule
rules.body: Anything the system says about itself — labels, timers, counts, IDs, terminal — is Geist Mono. Anything addressed to the human is Geist Sans.

rules.name: The Carved Rule
rules.body: If a resting surface needs to look different from its neighbor, change its tone or engrave it — never lift it. Drop shadows are for things that will disappear.

dos: Do use Superade Yellow only where action or attention is being asked — The Signal Rule.
Do tint issue-colored surfaces with color-mix over their base at the prescribed percentages; pair every colored surface with its quieter slate fallback.
Do keep controls on the compact scale: 32px buttons, 12px type, 4px spacing grid, 6-10px radii.
Do put machine voice (labels, timers, IDs, counts) in Geist Mono with tabular-nums where digits tick.
Do carve depth inward — tonal tiers, hairline seams, engraved insets; reserve drop shadows for transient overlays.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: the issue-color crossfade and phase morphs already gate on it; new motion must too.
donts: Don't build SaaS dashboard clichés: metric-card grids, gradient accents, or marketing gloss inside the product.
Don't drift toward the AI-chat startup look: bubbly chat-first layouts, sparkle icons, purple gradients, mascot energy.
Don't ship enterprise-DevOps-console sprawl: cluttered toolbars, inconsistent panels, Jenkins/Grafana utilitarianism.
Don't let it feel like Electron-app blandness — a website in a frame; the shell is an instrument with native manners.
Don't flat-fill an issue color, use terracotta or a signal hue as an issue color, or add a green anywhere in the Superade theme — its palette is navy, yellow, red, blue.
Don't add perpetual motion beyond the working spinner and timer; stillness is the 'needs you' signal and must stay legible.
Don't use white text on Superade Yellow — ink on yellow is always Race Navy.
